signal.title: FDIC setting standards for Stablecoins ft GENIUS ACT
signal.reasoning: moderate source, strong historical pattern match.
signal.signal_briefing: March 2023 SVB collapse crashed regional banks 20%+ in days. This is a systemic risk signal. Large caps typically outperform. Flight to safety into treasuries. Credit conditions tighten.

notes: FDIC setting stablecoin standards is regulatory normalization/institutionalization of stablecoins — a risk-reduction measure. Pattern p006 (SVB Collapse) predicts financials_volatility, treasury_bid, credit_tightening from an acute bank-funding-stress event. FDIC laying out guardrails does not produce any of these outcomes. SVB pattern mismatch. Stablecoin standards more likely to reduce systemic risk than trigger financials volatility.
verification_note: FDIC setting stablecoin standards is regulatory normalization/institutionalization of stablecoins — a risk-reduction measure. Pattern p006 (SVB Collapse) predicts financials_volatility, treasury_bid, credit_tightening from an acute bank-funding-stress event. FDIC laying out guardrails does not produce any of these outcomes. evidence_pack.summary: Regulatory normalization mislabeled as SVB-type systemic risk. Incorrect.

notes: UK airport legal dispute over £205m Cardiff subsidy ruling. Pattern p005 (GameStop Short Squeeze) requires crowded short positioning, call buying surge, and dealer hedging amplification. No borrow fee spike or volatility clustering in airport stocks from this ruling.
